name: deacetylipecoside to hydrogen donor
summary: A 12-step route from deacetylipecoside(1+) to hydrogen donor, ingested from Rhea. Every step is curated by Rhea and independently verified here to balance in mass and charge.

reactions.name: secologanin + reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + O2 = secoxyloganin + oxidized [N...
reactions.equation: secologanin + reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + O2 = secoxyloganin + oxidized [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + H2O + 2 H(+)

reactions.name: taurochenodeoxycholate 6alpha-hydroxylase
reactions.equation: lithocholate + reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + O2 = hyodeoxycholate + oxidized [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + H2O + H(+)

reactions.name: N-hydroxy-L-tyrosine + reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + O2 = N,N-dihydroxy-L-ty...
reactions.equation: N-hydroxy-L-tyrosine + reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + O2 = N,N-dihydroxy-L-tyrosine + oxidized [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + H2O + H(+)

reactions.name: riboflavin + FMNH2 + O2 = lumichrome + D-ribose + FMN + H2O
reactions.equation: riboflavin + FMNH2 + O2 = lumichrome + D-ribose + FMN + H2O

reactions.name: aldehydo-D-ribose 5-phosphate + D-glyceraldehyde 3-phosphate + NH4(+) = pyridoxal 5'-ph...
reactions.equation: aldehydo-D-ribose 5-phosphate + D-glyceraldehyde 3-phosphate + NH4(+) = pyridoxal 5'-phosphate + phosphate + 4 H2O + H(+)

reactions.name: pyridoxal 5'-phosphate synthase (glutamine hydrolyzing)
reactions.equation: aldehydo-D-ribose 5-phosphate + D-glyceraldehyde 3-phosphate + L-glutamine = pyridoxal 5'-phosphate + L-glutamate + phosphate + 3 H2O + H(+)

reactions.name: sn-glycerol-1-phosphate dehydrogenase
reactions.equation: sn-glycerol 1-phosphate + NADP(+) = dihydroxyacetone phosphate + NADPH + H(+)
